entry.title: New: CR 25-17 (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
Recommending ADOPTION of Resolution 25-50, CD1, to approve the appointment of Jonathan Likeke Scheuer to the East Maui Regional Community Board as the Hawaiian Homes Commission’s representative for a term expiring March 31, 2030.

Water Authority, Social Services, and Parks Committee (2025-2027)

View on the council site
